picks.quote: There is no way King Green can lose this fight. He's got to win this one. So I got no choice but to go with him, and I like him to get the KO here
I think Brady does that to move to 19 and 2 by decision, more than likely. That's my opinion.
I got to lean towards Volkov, a guy that's going for his 40th professional win. ... I got to take him to win by decision.
I think Joshua Van dominates on the feet to retain the title. ... In my opinion, he wins by decision to move to 17 and 2.
when this thing kicks off, it's going to be all Hamzat Chimaev, in my opinion. He'll get the win and hopefully the finish
